name: Reese's Chewy Chocolare Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 2/3 cups Reese's Peanut Butter Chips (10 oz. package)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a bowl, mix together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter and sugar with an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs and vanilla; beat well.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture, beating well.
6. Stir in peanut butter chips.
7. Drop rounded teaspoons of batter onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 8 to 9 minutes. Do not overbake; cookies will be soft and may puff while baking before flattening as they cool.
9. Cool slightly on the cookie sheet, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
10. About 4 dozen cookies are produced.
Pan Recipe:
1. Spread batter evenly in a greased 15-1/2 x 10-1/2 x 1-inch jelly-roll pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes or until set.
3. Cool completely on the wire rack; cut into bars. About 4 dozen bars are produced.
Ice Cream Sandwich:
1. Prepare Reese's Chewy Chocolate Cookies as directed and allow them to cool.
2. Press a small scoop of vanilla ice cream between two flat cookies.
3. Wrap and freeze to create an ice cream sandwich.
